case_title: MARGARET M. MCNULTY VS. JOHN MILLER et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO PAUL BRUMBAUGH BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-05-2011 AT 1:30PM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$5.00) SERVED DEC-16-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRUMBAUGH, PAUL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2011 - JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JOHN MILLER, 360 - 5TH ST.,SF,CA. 94102 (415) 359-5345

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINITFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MCNULTY, MARGARET M. AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, JOHN BRUMBAUGH, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCNULTY, MARGARET M. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MCNULTY, MARGARET M. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$5.00) SERVED DEC-25-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, JOHN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCNULTY, MARGARET M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, JOHN $10.00 PRINCIPAL, $10.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20.00, THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH AN EMPLOYER-EMPLOYEE RELATIONSHIP. ALTHOUGH THE COURT IS CONCERNED ABOUT ACTIONS TAKEN OR STATEMENTS MADE IN PLAINTIFF'S INDUSTRY, DETERMINATION OF DAMAGES WOULD BE SPECULATIVE. THE DAMAGES REPRESENTS RETURN OF PLAINTIFF'S KEY DEPOSIT. DEFENDANT PAUL BRUMBAUGH IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
